song_name: We Cant Be Friends Wait For Your Love

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: We Cant Be Friends Wait For Your Love

content:
[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
 I didn't think you'd understand me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
 How could you ever even try?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
 I don't wanna tiptoe but I don't wanna hide[/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
But I don't wanna feed this monstruous fire[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Just wanna let this story die[/tab]

And I'll be alright


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
We can't be friends[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
But I'd like to just pre-tend[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]
You cling to your papers and pens[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
Wait until you like me again[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]
Wait for your love[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
Love, I'll wait for your love[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
 Me and my truth, we sit in silence[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
Mm, baby girl, it's just me and you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I don't wanna argue but I don't wanna bite[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]Bm[/ch]
My tongue, yeah, I think I’d rather die[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]
You got me misunderstood[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
But at least I look this good[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
We can't be friends[/tab]

I'll wait for your love[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]
Know that you made me[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]
I don't like how you paint me, yet I'm still here hangin'[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
Not what you made me[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]
It's somethin' like a daydream[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
But I feel so seen in the night[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]
So for now, it's only me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
 And maybe that's all I need[/tab]


[Chorus]
N.C.
We can't be friends
N.C.
But I'd like to just pre-tend
